params.name: base_currency
params.description: The base currency to which all results are behaving relative to. Defaults to USD.

params.name: currencies
params.description: Comma-separated currency codes to receive. Defaults to all available currencies.

params.name: type
params.description: Currency type filter: fiat, metal, or crypto. Defaults to all types.

items.docs: Returns the latest foreign exchange rates for the given base currency. Rate freshness is plan-dependent: daily (Free), hourly (Small), or every 60 seconds (Medium and above).

info.name: Get historical exchange rates for a date.

params.name: date
params.description: Required. Date to retrieve historical rates from (format 2021-12-31). Data extends back to 1999.

params.name: base_currency
params.description: The base currency. Defaults to USD.

items.docs: Returns end-of-day exchange rates for a specific date, with historical data reaching back to 1999.

info.name: Get time-series exchange rates for a range.

params.name: datetime_start
params.description: Required. ISO8601 start of the range.

params.name: datetime_end
params.description: Required. ISO8601 end of the range.

params.name: accuracy
params.description: day (up to 366 days), hour (max 7-day range, 3 months back), quarter_hour (max 24h range, 7 days back), or minute (max 6h range, 7 days back). Defaults to day.

params.name: base_currency
params.description: The base currency. Defaults to USD.

items.docs: Returns exchange rate data for a datetime range in one call, with selectable accuracy. Requires the Medium plan or above.

params.name: value
params.description: Required. The value you want to convert.

params.name: base_currency
params.description: The base currency of the value. Defaults to USD.

params.name: currencies
params.description: Comma-separated target currency codes. Defaults to all available currencies.

params.name: date
params.description: Optional historical date to convert with (format 2021-12-31). Defaults to today's rates.

items.docs: Converts a monetary value from the base currency into one or more target currencies, using today's rates or a given historical date. Requires a paid plan (Small and up).

params.name: currencies
params.description: Comma-separated currency codes to receive. Defaults to all.

params.name: type
params.description: Currency type filter: fiat, metal, or crypto.

items.docs: Returns metadata for all supported currencies - symbol, name, native symbol, decimal digits, rounding, code, plural name, type, and associated countries.
Checks whether the API is up and returns your monthly and grace quota usage. Requests to this endpoint do not count against your quota or rate limit.
